items.briefing:
Scamwatch is reminding Australian small businesses to stay alert to scams, which continue to pose a real financial threat — particularly through fake invoices, phishing emails, and impersonation calls. Separately, a new report highlights that Australian public sector organisations are under increasing pressure to modernise their technology securely, meaning staff should expect continued changes to digital systems and processes.

A useful reminder this week: deepfake technology is being used to create convincing fake images and audio of real people, including in workplace or community settings. **Practical tip:** If you receive an unexpected request by phone, video, or message — even from a familiar voice or face — verify it through a separate, trusted channel before acting.

featured.title: Kinetic IT report flags AI & sovereign execution gap
featured.quote: Australian agencies lack funding and skills to safely deploy AI systems.
